Risk Title: CVS Retail Prod support - Challenges observed on Automation Use cases
Risk Desc: CVS Retail Prod support - Use cases were analyzed and identified to eliminate manual effort. Recommended possible solutions with latest technology and observed challenges on implementation. CVS SME`s suggested that development team will work on identified automation use cases phase by phase. This leads to delay in implementation of use cases considering development team priroities. Project-Level          Technical          Platform incompatibility         Minor        Rare       Low
Category:
Reiteration of Automation benefits to CVS SME and increase precedence of use cases/user stories in upcoming sprints. Regular follow-up with development team on tentative ETA.
Continuous discussion is in progress with CVS to ensure that Automation use cases are implemented on priroity

Risk Title: Approval of the drafted Statement of Work (SOW) is still in progress.
Risk Desc:
Context: The drafted Statement of Work (SOW) for the project has been prepared and submitted for review.

Condition: The SOW is still pending formal approval, leaving key elements such as project scope, responsibilities, deliverables, timelines, and cost undefined.

Consequence: This may lead to delays in project initiation, misalignment of stakeholder expectations, resource allocation conflicts, and potential cost overruns or contractual disputes. Project-Level           External                          Customer         Major        Rare       Low
Category:
Coordinating with the stakeholders for approval
Communicating revised timelines and risks to client and internal stakeholders to manage expectations.
